title: Simple Crispy Cabbage and Carrot Fritters ● Homemade Recipe [Simple & Easy]
description:
Simple Crispy Cabbage and Carrot Fritters ● Homemade Recipe
Ingredients:
¾ cup Cabbage (Chopped) 
½ cup Carrot (Chopped)
¾ cup All-purpose Flour
1/2 teaspoon baking powder
1 teaspoon salt
1 egg
¾ cup water
½ tablespoon oil

Oil for deep frying

Steps:
Add flour, baking powder and salt in a large mixing bowl
Stir in the egg and mix well
Add water gradually until it forms a soft dough
Add the cabbage and carrot and mix well
Add ½ tablespoon oil and mix well

Heat the oil
Scope one spoonful for the vegetable mixture 
Fry both side till golden brown
Serve immediately with chili sauce
